insights.hypoBody: {{value}} mg/dL — take 15 g of fast sugar (3 pieces) and re-measure in 15 minutes.

insights.sugarBody: {{grams}} g of sugar consumed — favor low-GI foods for the rest of the day.

insights.activityBody: Well done on your {{min}} min of activity! Exercise can lower glucose for several hours — watch for signs of hypo.

insights.scanNextBody: Photograph your plate to estimate carbs and calculate your bolus automatically.

profile.title: My profile
profile.name: Name
profile.deleteConfirmBody: All your data (glucose, meals, profile) will be erased. This action cannot be undone.

consent.stepSub: Last step — read and accept each condition to create your account.
consent.footer: You can review these conditions and withdraw your consent at any time from your profile.
consent.dataDesc: I agree that my health data (glucose, meals, insulin, activity) is stored securely.
consent.dataDetailIntro: GlucoAI stores your data to give you complete diabetes tracking. Here is exactly what is stored and how it is protected.
consent.dataS1B: Your glucose readings, insulin injections, scanned meals (photos and nutrition values), physical activity and your medical profile: diabetes type, ratios, target range, emergency contact.
consent.dataS2B: Your data is stored encrypted on secure servers. It is never sold or shared with third parties for advertising purposes.
consent.dataS3B: You can view, edit or delete your data at any time from your profile. Deleting your account permanently erases all your data.
consent.dataNote: Without this consent the app cannot work: diabetes tracking requires storing your readings.
consent.aiDesc: I allow the AI assistant to read my data to personalize its answers in the chat and voice call.
consent.aiDetailIntro: The GlucoAI assistant (chat and voice call) uses your data to give you truly personalized answers instead of generic advice.
consent.aiS1B: Your medical profile (diabetes type, ratios, target range), your glucose readings, scanned meals, insulin injections, activity and your last-7-days statistics.
consent.aiS2B: To answer questions like "what did I eat today?" or "what do you think of my glucose?" precisely, the AI needs to see your real data while you talk to it.
consent.aiS3B: Your data is transmitted securely to the AI only while you are using it. It is never used to train artificial-intelligence models.
consent.aiNote: You can use the app without ever talking to the AI — but if you use it, this access is required for it to be useful.
consent.limitsDesc: I understand the AI gives suggestions, can be wrong, and never replaces medical advice.
consent.limitsDetailIntro: The GlucoAI assistant is a help and education tool. It has important limitations you must know before using it.
consent.limitsS1B: Everything the AI tells you — food advice, analyses of your readings, insulin education — are educational suggestions. They are never medical prescriptions to follow 100%.
consent.limitsS2B: Like any artificial intelligence, it can make errors, misread a situation, or give imprecise information. Always double-check important information before acting.
consent.limitsS3B: Never change your treatment (insulin doses, medication) without your doctor or care team. Only they know your full medical history.
consent.limitsNote: In case of severe symptoms (severe hypoglycemia, fainting), do not use the app: call emergency services immediately.
consent.termsDesc: I accept the GlucoAI terms of use and privacy policy.
consent.termsDetailIntro: By creating an account you accept the GlucoAI usage rules. Here is the essential part.
consent.termsS1B: The app is intended for personal diabetes-tracking assistance. It is not a certified medical device and does not replace a consultation.
consent.termsS2B: You are responsible for keeping your credentials confidential. The information you enter must be accurate for your tracking to be meaningful.
consent.termsS3B: GlucoAI evolves regularly: features may be added, changed or removed. Any important update to the terms will be announced in the app.
consent.termsNote: Declining these terms prevents account creation.
